name: Portfolio
description: An image-forward portfolio for designers, studios, and makers: warm paper, a single terracotta accent, big type, and a work grid that lets the projects lead.
whenToUse: Pick for showing work: designer, photographer, or studio portfolios, agency sites, case-study showcases, personal sites for makers. The chain lets the projects lead — name-led intro, selected-work grid, large single-project features, about, contact, footer. Warm paper tones with a single terracotta accent; type stays quiet so imagery dominates. Avoid for product marketing, events, or text-heavy content.
